scripts.setup: npm install && npm run build:shared && npm run db:generate && npm run db:push
scripts.db:generate: concurrently "npm run db:generate:order" "npm run db:generate:inventory" "npm run db:generate:analytics"
scripts.db:push: concurrently "npm run db:push:order" "npm run db:push:inventory" "npm run db:push:analytics"
scripts.db:push:order: cd services/order && npx prisma db push --accept-data-loss
scripts.db:push:inventory: cd services/inventory && npx prisma db push --accept-data-loss
scripts.db:push:analytics: cd services/analytics && npx prisma db push --accept-data-loss
scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others "npm run dev:gateway" "npm run dev:order" "npm run dev:inventory" "npm run dev:analytics" "npm run dev:dashboard"
